## What & why

<!-- Summary of the change and the problem it solves. Link issues: Fixes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build / CI
- [ ] Breaking change (requires ADR + migration notes)

## Checklist

- [ ] `dotnet build -c Release` passes with zero warnings
- [ ] `dotnet test -c Release` passes (new/changed behavior covered by tests)
- [ ] `dotnet format --verify-no-changes` passes
- [ ] Docs updated (feature docs / configuration reference / troubleshooting as applicable)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Public API changes follow `docs/api/public-api-review-checklist.md`
- [ ] New dependencies documented per `docs/architecture/dependency-rules.md`
- [ ] No secrets, real environment URLs, or tenant ids in code, tests, or docs
